title: Comms (lead interactions) is built against non-existent columns — fix to the canonical school_lead_interactions schema and make the capture/list correct
business_reason: The CRM 'Comms' button records lead interactions, but the generated sub-collection writes columns that do not exist in the canonical model (lead_id/channel/note/created_by). Against a real Supabase table every insert throws and is swallowed by a catch{} that returns applied:true (P4.5 silent-insert-failure). The list shows blanks because channel/note are not real columns. Net effect: the Comms button is non-functional against the real DB and silently loses every interaction.
scope_note: This is CR 1 of 2. CR-0004 makes the Comms core CORRECT and FUNCTIONAL (right columns, multi-field capture, masking) — including the minimal shared-generator generalization the fix depends on. The additive follow-up automation (next_followup_at -> task_work_queue task + notification_ops reminder) and edit-with-reason are deferred to FR-SCHOOL-CRM-2026-0005.

current_state.ui: Comms drawer lists [channel, note]; add form has a single 'Add note' field.
current_state.spec_actions_sub_collection: table school_lead_interactions, parent_fk 'lead_id', add_required ['note'], add_row { lead_id, channel, note, created_by, updated_at }.
current_state.generated_service: leadService.addInteraction writes { lead_id, channel, note, created_by, updated_at }; catch { /* local */ } swallows insert failure and returns applied:true.
current_state.generator: _validation/gen_actions.py gen_sub() hardcodes payload type { channel?, note? } and validates only add_required[0].

missing_required.interaction_code: NOT NULL, unique, pattern LINT-[0-9]{8} -> server-generated (P2.4)

optional_now_collected.next_followup_at: timestamptz nullable (STORED in CR-0004; the downstream task/reminder EFFECT is CR-0005)

deferred_to_0005: attachment_file (uuid file; needs FieldInput file type + storage)

param_14.question: Record a lead interaction (type + summary, optional outcome + follow-up date) against the correct canonical school_lead_interactions schema, with sensitive fields masked.
param_14.answer: Fix sub_collection to canonical columns (school_lead_id, interaction_type, summary, staff_owner_id, interaction_code code:LINT, interaction_at $now, interaction_status const:recorded). Capture interaction_type (select, exclude 'system'), summary (textarea, required), outcome (select, optional), next_followup_at (date, optional). List interaction_at, interaction_type, summary (masked), outcome. staff_owner_id set server-side from actor (never client). Drop the silent catch so insert failures surface.
param_14.workflow_entities: record_interaction (audit event); no lifecycle transition on the lead in this CR
param_14.security_implications: interaction_policy.school_visible=false + sensitive_notes_masking: enforced at the ACCESS-CONTROL layer — interactions are a staff-only route (requireStaffScope) and staff scope narrows to assigned leads, so schools never reach summary (IDOR/scope is the control). NOTE: field-level masking of `summary` is NOT added because the masking engine (config/masking.json) matches on field NAME globally with no table scope; a `summary` rule would over-mask security_incidents.summary and security_alerts.summary. Table-aware masking is a separate cross-cutting CR. Mass-assignment: client-supplied staff_owner_id/interaction_code/interaction_status are never read (only mapped columns written) (P3.9). interaction_type/outcome reject out-of-enum values (P2.2).
param_14.approval_implications: none (no approval gate on recording an interaction)
param_14.downstream_dependencies: gen_sub() must be generalized for a multi-field typed payload + multi-field required validation + masking (shared -> benefits every module's detail panel, P0.6). next_followup_at is STORED here; its task+reminder effect and edit-with-reason are CR-0005.
param_14.assumptions: Recording an interaction does not itself advance the lead stage. 'note' remains the default interaction_type when unspecified.

principles_pass.interaction_type: P1.1/P2.2 — finite enum -> select; exclude 'system' (machine-only); required
principles_pass.summary: P1.9/P2.10 — sensitive text -> textarea, masked on read; required (P1.4)
principles_pass.interaction_at: P2.6 — domain timestamp NOT NULL -> default $now
principles_pass.next_followup_at: P2.8 — nullable date -> optional; effect deferred to CR-0005
principles_pass.interaction_code: P2.4 — server-generated LINT-XXXXXXXX, not a field
principles_pass.staff_owner_id: P3.9/P2.7 — server-set from actor; rejected from client
principles_pass.list_columns: P1.2/P1.9 — interaction_at, interaction_type, summary(masked), outcome; titleized labels
principles_pass.generalize: P0.6 — multi-field detail-panel capture lands in shared gen_sub/ModuleTable, not a CRM fork
principles_pass.silent_failure: P4.5 — drop catch{/*local*/}; surface insert errors

functional: add with required only (type+summary) inserts correct canonical columns
security_owasp: A03: arbitrary text in summary is stored verbatim via parameterized insert (no injection / no interpretation)
A08 mass-assignment: client-supplied staff_owner_id/interaction_code/interaction_status are ignored (only mapped columns written)
A01 IDOR (parent-scope): KNOWN GAP — sub-collection is not scope-checked; tracked + fixed in FR-SCHOOL-CRM-2026-0006 (shared gen_sub fix). A01 test added there as failing-first.
concurrency: two parallel adds for the same lead both succeed with DISTINCT interaction_code (P2.4 unique under interleaving)
idempotency: duplicate request with same key collapses to one row if X-Idempotency-Key applies to sub-collection adds
